'''tayuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiezhi|xiezhi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiezhi|xiezhi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tayuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæyizith|tæyizith]] || [[word:tæyizij|tæyizij]] || [[word:tæyizish|tæyizish]] || [[word:tæyizi|tæyizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tayuyuzuth|tayuyuzuth]] || [[word:tayuyuzuj|tayuyuzuj]] || [[word:tayuyuzush|tayuyuzush]] || [[word:tayuyuzu|tayuyuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tayuzuth|tayuzuth]] || [[word:tayuzuj|tayuzuj]] || [[word:tayuzush|tayuzush]] || [[word:tayuzu|tayuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tayufzuth|tayufzuth]] || [[word:tayufzuj|tayufzuj]] || [[word:tayufzush|tayufzush]] || [[word:tayufzuf|tayufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tayuzuthu|tayuzuthu]] || [[word:tayuzuju|tayuzuju]] || [[word:tayuzushu|tayuzushu]] || [[word:tayuzuku|tayuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tayuzuth|tayuzuth]] || [[word:tayuzuj|tayuzuj]] || [[word:tayuzush|tayuzush]] || [[word:tayuzu|tayuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tayuzuthul|tayuzuthul]] || [[word:tayuzujul|tayuzujul]] || [[word:tayuzushul|tayuzushul]] || [[word:tayuzukul|tayuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tayuzuthuthu|tayuzuthuthu]] || [[word:tayuzujuju|tayuzujuju]] || [[word:tayuzushushu|tayuzushushu]] || [[word:tayuzuku|tayuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tayuzuthun|tayuzuthun]] || [[word:tayuzujun|tayuzujun]] || [[word:tayuzushun|tayuzushun]] || [[word:tayuzukun|tayuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tayuzuthuoro|tayuzuthuoro]] || [[word:tayuzujuoro|tayuzujuoro]] || [[word:tayuzushuoro|tayuzushuoro]] || [[word:tayuzukuoro|tayuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
